overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt exploring a foggy medieval harbor at night. The character transitions from a rocky overlook to wooden docks, passing burning braziers and dock workers, with atmospheric blue lighting and distant castle silhouettes.

agents.ego_description: Standing on rocky outcrop, slowly turning to survey the foggy harbor and distant castle

entered.detail: Large moss-covered rock formation where character stands
Silhouetted castle towers visible through fog across the water
Orange fires burning in the distance along the shoreline
Dark water of the harbor reflecting minimal light
Tall stone wall running along the right side of the overlook

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a foggy night with Geralt standing on a rocky outcrop overlooking a medieval harbor. Distant castle towers loom through the mist while fires burn along the far shore. The character slowly pans the view, taking in the atmospheric blue-lit environment before the journey begins.

events.description: Character begins walking forward along the rocky shoreline path

agents.ego_description: Walking steadily along the rocky shoreline toward the village buildings

entered.detail: Uneven rocky ground along the water's edge
Weathered wooden posts marking the path boundary
Medieval-style house with timber framing and red roof

segments.scene_description: Geralt begins walking along a narrow rocky path between the harbor water and a stone wall. The camera follows from behind as he approaches a timber-framed house with warm light glowing from within, moving away from the open overlook into a more enclosed shoreline route.

events.description: Transition from rocky shoreline to cobblestone path near buildings

agents.ego_description: Walking past stone buildings and burning braziers along the harbor front

entered.detail: Worn cobblestone paving along the harbor front
Solid stone building with small windows and wooden door
Metal brazier with bright orange flames providing warm light
Simple wooden fence enclosing a small garden area
Large wooden sailing ship docked at the harbor
Wooden pilings and edge of the dock structure

segments.scene_description: The ground transitions to cobblestone as Geralt walks between harbor buildings. A burning brazier casts warm orange light against the cool blue night, illuminating the stone architecture. The docked ships become more prominent on the left as the character approaches the proper dock area.

events.description: Stepping onto wooden dock planks from cobblestone shore

agents.ego_description: Walking along wooden docks, passing a large dock worker and approaching moored ships

notable_agents.action: Large shirtless dock worker with tattoos standing near rope coils, wiping his brow

entered.detail: Weathered wooden planks of the dock walkway
Large wooden sailing vessel with tall masts docked alongside
Thick coils of hemp rope stacked on the dock
Wooden cargo barrels stacked near the dock edge
Tall wooden mast with rigging from the docked vessel

segments.scene_description: Geralt steps onto the wooden dock planks, passing a large dock worker standing near rope coils. The environment is filled with maritime elements - wooden barrels, ship masts, and rigging. The fog persists as the character walks deeper into the dock area, approaching the ships.

events.description: Walking up ramp and boarding the ship deck

agents.ego_description: Walking up the ramp onto a ship and crossing the deck toward the cabin entrance

entered.detail: Wooden deck of the ship with weathered planks
Raised wooden cabin structure with door entrance
Burlap sacks of cargo stacked on the deck
Wooden railing along the edge of the ship deck
Dark wooden door of the ship's cabin

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks up a wooden ramp onto the deck of a ship, leaving the dock behind. The camera follows as he crosses the weathered deck past cargo sacks, approaching the ship's cabin. The foggy harbor remains visible in the background as the character reaches the cabin door, concluding the exploration sequence.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate rocky overlook into the heart of a foggy medieval harbor and onto the deck of a ship. It begins with a wide pan of distant castle towers and fires burning through a blue-lit mist before the camera follows Geralt down a narrow rocky path toward a glowing timber-framed house. As the terrain shifts to cobblestone, the scene moves between harbor buildings where burning braziers cast orange light against the cool night, bringing the docked ships into clearer view. The camera then transitions from stone to wooden planks as Geralt passes dock workers and maritime gear, moving deeper into the fog-shrouded wharf. Finally, the movement ascends a wooden ramp and crosses a weathered deck past cargo sacks, ending as the character reaches a ship's cabin with the harbor fading into the background.
